display_name: Luma Photon delivers industry-specific visual excellence, crafting images that align perfectly with professional standards - not just generic AI art. From marketing to creative design, each generation
description:
Luma Photon delivers industry-specific visual excellence, crafting images that align perfectly with professional standards - not just generic AI art. From marketing to creative design, each generation is purposefully tailored to your industry's unique requirements. 

Optional parameters:
Aspect ratio to change the aspect ratio of your generations (1:1, 16:9, 9:16, 4:3, 3:4, 21:9, 9:21 are supported). 

Note: Prompt input cannot exceed 5,000 characters.
